headline: US rig count up one as prices plunge
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was unchanged this week, the latest count Thursday by Baker Hughes shows, with 256 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 271 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 563 rigs. A year ago, 554 rigs were active. The count shows that 433 rigs sought oil, unchanged from the previous week, and 122 explored ...
